input: SELECT o.__id, COUNT(t.__id) as edge_count FROM objects o LEFT JOIN edges e ON o.__global_id = e.source_id LEFT JOIN objects t ON e.target_id = t.__global_id AND t.__id LIKE 'task%' WHERE o.__kind NOT IN ('__Document', '__TextBlock') GROUP BY o.__id
expected: SELECT o.__id, COUNT(t.__id) AS edge_count FROM objects o LEFT JOIN edges e ON o.__global_id = e.source_id AND e.__workspace = 'ws1' LEFT JOIN objects t ON e.target_id = t.__global_id AND t.__id LIKE 'task%' AND t.__workspace = 'ws1' WHERE o.__kind NOT IN ('__Document', '__TextBlock') AND o.__workspace = 'ws1' GROUP BY o.__id
